prompt:
Move the DNS CLI tool from gunk-dev/infra into this repo (armstrong). This tool manages DNS records via the Porkbun API.

## What to move
From gunk-dev/infra, copy these files into a new cmd/dns/ directory. You can fetch them with: gh api repos/gunk-dev/infra/contents/cmd/dns/<file> --jq .content | base64 -d

Files: main.go, sync.go, porkbun.go, preview.go, sync_test.go

## Go module setup
Create go.mod with module gunk.dev/armstrong, go 1.25.0, dep github.com/spf13/cobra v1.10.2. Run go mod tidy.

## Reusable DNS workflow
Create .github/workflows/dns-sync.yml (workflow_call) that checks out the caller repo, checks out armstrong to build the DNS tool, then runs: cue export ./dns --out json | ./dns-tool sync. Accept secrets for PORKBUN_API_KEY/PORKBUN_SECRET_KEY.

## CI
Update CI to build and test Go code.

## Acceptance criteria
- cmd/dns/ building, go test passing
- Reusable dns-sync.yml
- CI updated
- All checks pass
